tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def top-issue (apply max-key :count (sentry_issues {:status "unresolved"})))
(def subject "Top error")
(def body (str "The top unresolved Sentry issue is: \n\n" (:title top-issue) "\n\nProject: " (:project top-issue) "\nCount: " (:count top-issue)))
(insert! :emails {:to_addr "oncall@acme.io" :subject subject :body body)}"}
